Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.metaDescription: Policy regarding personal information collection and processing
Privacy.section1Content: This blog uses Google Analytics to collect anonymized visitor statistics (page views, visit duration, approximate location, etc.). We do not collect personally identifiable information.
Privacy.section2Content: This blog uses cookies to improve user experience and for analytics purposes. You can disable cookies through your browser settings, but some features may be limited.
Privacy.section3Content: The collected information is used solely for improving blog operations, analyzing visitor statistics, and enhancing content quality.
Privacy.section4Content: If you have any questions about our privacy practices, please contact us through the About page.

About.title: About
About.metaDescription: Chris Choi — Full Stack Developer turning UX into reality through code
About.aboutBlogContent: VXD Blog is a personal blog and tutoring platform integrated with Notion as a headless CMS. Optimized for SEO via SSR and enhanced by Gemini CLI for development productivity.
About.aboutAuthorContent: A Full Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience delivering business value using Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and AWS. I combine clean architecture with AI tools to create measurable business impact.
About.contactContent: If you have any inquiries, please reach out through GitHub or email.

Terms.title: Terms of Use
Terms.copyrightContent: All content on this blog (articles, images, code, etc.) is protected by copyright law unless otherwise stated. Personal reference is permitted, but commercial use or unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.
Terms.disclaimerContent: The information on this blog is based on personal experience and learning. While we strive for accuracy, technical information may become outdated over time. We are not legally responsible for any outcomes resulting from the use of information on this blog.
Terms.usageContent: When using this blog, please respect the rights of others and do not use it for any illegal purposes.

Collaboration.plan2Desc: Next.js·Node.js Fullstack / AWS Infra / AI Integration / Architecture Consulting

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Check out common questions about collaboration and services.
FAQ.q1: What technical stack do you mainly use?
FAQ.a1: I primarily use Next.js + TypeScript + Node.js fullstack, and actively leverage AWS infrastructure and AI tools like Claude/Gemini.
FAQ.q2: What areas do you cover in freelance projects?
FAQ.a2: I handle web application development, backend API design, AWS infra setup, AI integration, and refactoring. Worked with clients like Wise Express, The Varai, and CPR Learning.
FAQ.a3: Please reach out via email or LinkedIn. I respond within 24 hours.
FAQ.q4: Are you currently looking for a job?
FAQ.a4: While working at The Robot Coding, I am open to exploring Full-stack or AI-related positions.
FAQ.q5: Which AI tools do you use?
FAQ.a5: I use Claude Code for code reviews and architecture, and Gemini CLI for automation workflows.

core.title: FullStack Expertise

chrome.title: Tamago Bot
chrome.desc: A Chrome extension where you complete tasks with a digital pet. Managing dynamic UI states with React, a product actually deployed to the Chrome Web Store.

mindtap.title: MindTap Vision Pro
mindtap.desc: An app that streams Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) data in real-time to Apple Vision Pro. A multi-platform system combining Python data pipelines and Firebase synchronization.
